title: Submittal Requirement
description: Schema for a submittal requirement — a required submittal document or item for review as specified in a Division 07 specification section.

submittal_id.description: Unique identifier for this submittal requirement.

title.description: Concise description of the required submittal.

csi_section.description: CSI section code where this submittal is required.

timing.description: When the submittal must be provided (e.g., 'prior to installation', 'with bid').

review_requirement.description: Review and approval requirements (e.g., 'architect review required', 'for information only').
